note: Conditions A and B recovered from log after pod termination. Condition C re-running.

C_causal_wavelet.status: TERMINATED — pod died ep10 step 1000/3519 on second re-run. Ep9 best used as proxy.

run1_val_ppl_by_epoch.note: First run — SAME tokenizer as A/B (same pod). Terminated ep9 step 3000/3519.

run2_val_ppl_by_epoch.note: Second re-run — DIFFERENT tokenizer (fresh 50k-doc BPE, separate pod). NOT directly comparable to A/B PPL.

The ep6 gap (74.0 run1 vs 118.8 run2) is consistent with tokenizer variance, not architectural regression. Use 13M scale (A: 86.8, C: 87.2, same tokenizer) for architecture comparison.
